title: Phantom Hugs
description: Adds a new item which makes Phantoms passive when you have the item in your inventory, but at a cost. Also adds a new way to create Vexes.
body:
## Phantom Hugs Phantom Hugs adds several new features; like 3 new items, Bottle of Sparks, Bottle of Gloom, and Darkness insignia.
### **Bottle of Sparks**: A new item which can be obtained from shift clicking an Allay with a Glass Bottle. This item can be used to place Sparks to light up areas or put in a Cauldron. **Sparks**: Sparks is a new block which appears when you place a bottle of sparks on the ground this block is a light source which is transparent and is only visible by the particles it emits when a player is under 15 blocks away, when under 5 blocks away it will emit more particles than before. ### **Bottle of Gloom**: A new item which is obtained by Haunting Sparks in a Cauldron. This item is one of the items which are used to craft the Darkness insignia, the item can also turn Allays into Vexes by shift right clicking them with it. ### **Darkness Insignia**: The Darkness insignia is a new item and the main part of this mod. This item Makes Phantoms not target you aslong as the item is in your inventory, but it does this at a cost. This item is obtained by Crafting 3 netherite scrap, netherite ingot, and a Bottle of Gloom together in a certain shape in a crafting table
